ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the accident occurred */,
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the highway where the accident occurred */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the accident occurred */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the accident */,
  "accident_time" TEXT /* Time of the accident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "lighting_conditions" TEXT /* Lighting conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "accident_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the accident */,
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of the accident */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the accident */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the severity of the accident */,
  "number_of_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the accident */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the accident */,
  "number_of_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of fatalities resulting from the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES accident_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_cause_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_id") REFERENCES accident_causes ("cause_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_highway_id FOREIGN KEY ("highway_id") REFERENCES highways ("highway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES accident_severity ("severity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square miles */,
  "region_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "region_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "highways" (
  "highway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each highway */,
  "highway_name" TEXT /* Name of the highway */,
  "highway_type" TEXT /* Type of highway (e.g., Interstate, US Route) */,
  "highway_length" REAL /* Length of the highway in miles */,
  "highway_speed_limit" INTEGER /* Speed limit on the highway */,
  "highway_start_point" TEXT /* Start point of the highway */,
  "highway_end_point" TEXT /* End point of the highway */,
  "highway_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the highway's centroid */,
  "highway_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the highway's centroid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("highway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "closest_city" TEXT /* Closest city to the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the location */,
  "location_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "location_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accident type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the accident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_severity" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "severity_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_causes" (
  "cause_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause */,
  "cause_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause */,
  "cause_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the cause */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the accident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the accident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
